response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience as a full-stack and software developer but entirely lacks the hardware engineering, SoC modeling, and deep learning optimization background required for a Principal Performance Architect focusing on AI accelerators. His expertise aligns with web and application development rather than hardware-software co-design and GPU architecture.
strengths: Over 15 years of software development experience, exceeding the minimum requirement of 8+ years.
Holds a Bachelor of Science in Computer Science, fulfilling the baseline educational requirement.
Demonstrated ability to write low-latency, high-performance software using DLang and C/C++.
concerns: Completely lacks experience in SoC and IP modeling or hardware-software co-design.
No demonstrated background in optimizing deep-learning workloads or AI hardware accelerators.
Missing preferred qualifications such as GPU, SIMD, and MIMD architecture experience.
